subject: [PATCH v5 02/36] mm/page_alloc: refactor build_node_zonelist() out of build_zonelists()

2026-07-20.patch_summary: This patch refactors the build_node_zonelist() function out of build_zonelists(). The new function builds a per-node fallback list from a candidate nodemask, allowing zonelists to be built from these lists instead of just the default N_MEMORY node state list. This change does not introduce any functional changes and maintains the same behavior as before. The patch also updates various functions to use the new build_node_zonelist() function.
